text: The system shall offer configuration flexibility to add new data fields and entities.
The system shall offer configuration flexibility to add new entity types and relationship types.
The system shall support structured data entry for common forms and fields.
The system should support multiple deployment options including client server and disconnected modes.
The system should provide the ability for computers in disconnected mode to reconnect to a server to share data.
The system should synchronize data so all instances working from the same server use the same data.
The system should electronically record and store data from remote devices for upload to an aggregating system.
The system should use configurable domain-specific vocabulary.
The system shall capture demographic data about persons including Subject ID and name.
The system shall capture demographic data about persons including address and date of birth.
The system shall capture demographic data about persons including gender and phone number.
The system shall capture demographic data about persons including race and ethnicity.
The system shall capture demographic data about persons including country of citizenship.
The system shall capture data about organizations including name and location.
The system shall capture data about organizations including contact information.
The system shall capture data about locations including name and type.
The system shall capture data about locations including street address and city.
The system shall capture data about locations including state and zip code.
The system shall capture data about locations including country and GPS coordinates.
The system shall capture data about animals including type and age.
The system shall capture data about animals including gender and species.
The system shall capture data about animals including owner name and address.
The system shall capture data about objects including name and type.
The system shall capture data about objects including physical descriptors and identification number.
The system shall capture data about conveyances including type and route.
The system shall capture data about gatherings including time and location.
The system shall capture an entity travel history.
The system shall assign a unique event identifier to each health event investigation.
The system should record the case definition for a health event.
The system should capture changes to the case definition as the health event evolves.
The system shall collect detailed conveyance data including carrier identifier and vehicle identification number.
The system shall avoid capturing redundant entity demographic information during case and exposure data entry.
The system shall capture case data including Case ID and suspected agent.
The system shall capture case data including case diagnosis and health status.
The system shall capture case data including case status and clinical history.
The system shall capture case data including symptom onset date and priority.
The system shall provide a means to update the case diagnosis manually or automatically.
The system shall capture dynamic event-specific case investigation data.
The system shall record and link all exposed entities to a case.
The system shall capture the jurisdiction investigating the event and the jurisdiction reporting the case.
The system shall capture exposure levels and type of exposure.
The system shall capture place and length of time of exposure.
The system shall capture the source of exposure and the exposed entity data.
The system shall support capturing dynamic event-specific contact data.
The system should support monitoring and follow-up activities for isolated or quarantined individuals.
The system shall assign a unique Specimen ID to each collected specimen.
The system shall link the subject of a specimen to the specimen via a unique Subject ID.
The system shall store specimen collection data including purpose and collection date.
The system should support bar-coding for specimen data capture.
The system shall capture chain of custody information for forensic and select agent samples.
The system shall create a laboratory test request for a specimen or group of specimens.
The system shall store laboratory results and link them to the original test request.
The system shall link laboratory results to the specimen collection record via Specimen ID.
The system should capture prophylaxis and treatment data including name and dosage.
The system should support activity logs for investigators to track actions.
The system shall develop and validate electronic questionnaires.
The system shall control the configuration of and revisions to investigation-specific questionnaires.
The system shall publish investigation-specific questionnaires and implementation guides.
The system shall support dynamically defined associations between entities.
The system shall link Entity ID to Event ID within the investigation scope.
The system shall support contact exposure tracing by linking one contact to multiple cases.
The system shall support contact exposure tracing by linking multiple contacts to a single case.
The system shall print questionnaires for field use and phone interviews.
The system shall aggregate data including number of cases and number of treatments administered.
The system shall accept data from other partner systems supporting outbreak management.
The system shall create and send messages for laboratory test requests.
The system shall receive and process messages for laboratory results.
The system shall exchange messages for case classifications with surveillance systems.
The system shall exchange messages for investigations and exposure contacts.
The system shall receive and process messages for administered countermeasures.
The system shall create and send messages for countermeasure administration requests.
The system shall record any known inconsistencies across its architecture models and views.
The system shall include each correspondence rule applying to the architecture description.
The system shall include a rationale for each included architecture viewpoint.
The system shall protect outbreak management data from corruption and unauthorized access.
